# Third-Party Notice for Borrowed Codex Materials

This subtree contains files copied from OpenAI Codex, primarily from
`codex-rs/apply-patch`, at upstream revision
`24a2d0c696d8b1b3d0c137f8e67126b33b07d189`.

Upstream project:
- OpenAI Codex
- Copyright 2025 OpenAI
- License: Apache License 2.0

Public references:
- Product page: https://chatgpt.com/codex
- Source repository: https://github.com/openai/codex

At the time of this scaffold, the copied materials are limited to:
- upstream Rust source snapshots kept for later adaptation;
- upstream invocation and standalone CLI reference sources kept for context only;
- upstream patch-format reference text;
- upstream scenario fixtures for compatibility testing.

The upstream Codex repository also contains its own `NOTICE` file for other
parts of that project. This scaffold only copies the files listed in
`SOURCES.md`.
